zh.lifeSummary: Jean VI De Roucy於1375年出生。他和Isabelle De Montaigu至少有1個女兒。他去世於1415年享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jean VI De Roucy于1375年出生。他和Isabelle De Montaigu至少有1个女儿。他去世于1415年享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): probably a variant of   Roach  .

variants.name: Rauch
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Helmut, Kurt, Erwin, Franz, Hans, Heinz, Horst, Wilfried, Angelika, Dieter, Elke.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: Jean VI De Roucy was born in 1375. He had at least 1 daughter with Isabelle De Montaigu. He died in 1415, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Jean VI De Roucy est né en 1375. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Isabelle De Montaigu. Il est décédé en 1415, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Jean VI De Roucy wurde 1375 geboren. Er hatte mit Isabelle De Montaigu mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1415 im Alter von 40 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Jean VI De Roucy è nato il nel 1375. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Isabelle De Montaigu. Morì nel 1415, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean VI De Roucyは1375年に生まれた。彼はIsabelle De Montaiguとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1415年に40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean VI De Roucy(은)는 1375년 태어났다. 그는 Isabelle De Montaigu(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Jean VI De Roucy nasceu em 1375. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Isabelle De Montaigu. Ele faleceu em 1415, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Jean VI De Roucy родился в 1375 г. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Isabelle De Montaigu. Он умер в 1415 г. в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Jean VI De Roucy nació en 1375. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Isabelle De Montaigu. Murió en 1415, a la edad de 40 años.
